perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a red t-shirt stands in a studio setting, speaking enthusiastically to the camera. (2) Cut to a futuristic circular building at night with bright neon lights and a prominent 'DINER' sign. (3) Brief shot of hands holding two different smartphones (Vivo Y100 and V29) over a display case. (4) Aerial night view of the Tesla Diner site, showing the circular structure and numerous white charging stalls surrounding it. (5) Back to the speaker in the studio, who is gesturing with his hands. (6) Interior shots of the diner show people sitting in black and white booths under warm, indirect lighting, with a retro 1950s aesthetic. (7) A close-up of a Tesla Optimus humanoid robot waving its hand is shown. (8) Images of French fries and fried chicken appear with price tags of US$4 and US$15 overlaid. (9) A white Tesla car is shown in a charging stall. (10) The speaker concludes by pointing at the camera and making a thumbs-down then wait gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic music starts immediately. A male voice speaks energetically in Mandarin, introducing the topic of Tesla's new restaurant. (2) The narration remains continuous and fast-paced, describing the features of the Los Angeles Tesla Diner while the music continues at a steady volume in the background. (3) Subtle digital sound effects ('blips' and 'dings') occur during scene transitions and text pop-ups. (4) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic sentence from the narrator as the music fades slightly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen throughout the video, providing a literal transcription of the spoken content. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'TESLA 特斯拉跨足餐飲' (Hook), '80個V4超充樁' (Fact), 'US$4', 'US$15' (Pricing), '自動扣款也OK!' (Feature), and 'miko 米可手機館' (Brand/Sponsor logo in the corner).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Facility Introduction -> Interior Detail -> Pricing -> Closing Question

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator in studio; approximately 8 patrons seen in diner interior shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a red t-shirt, a grey patterned flat cap, and black-rimmed glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A neutral studio background for the host; a futuristic, circular 1950s-style diner at night for the b-roll footage.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: High-key studio lighting for host; neon and cinematic night lighting for exterior shots.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Presentation -> Benefit Explanation -> Closing
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform and entertain viewers regarding Tesla's expansion into the restaurant industry with its Los Angeles diner, highlighting the blend of retro style and modern tech (like robots and EV charging).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal recommendation to buy phones at 'miko' coupled with visible branding and smartphone close-ups.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host wearing a signature red shirt and newsboy cap; use of specific '3C' branding logos.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes fast-paced editing and tech-curiosity hooks to maintain high engagement for a short-form tech news vlog.
